androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Save any status directly to your local gallery
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Download Status

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: One-tap to copy status text to clipboard
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Copy Status Caption

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: View statuses without sending a seen receipt
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Stealth Status View

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Disable automatic transition to the next story
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Disable Auto-Next
